item.gttruesteam.infused_slightly_compre: Infused Slightly Compressed Compression Spring Pack
item.gttruesteam.infused_somewhat_compre: Infused Somewhat Compressed Compression Spring Pack
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.beating_husk_1: §4This husk is no longer empty, it is beating like a heart full of energy...
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.beating_husk_2: §7Optional upgrade for §cInfernal boiler §7that allows better heating recipes
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.cim_1: §3Everything is just a concept, waiting to be materialized
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.cim_2: §7Large matrix that can be used for creating a concept catalysts, special symbols of specific concepts, that can be used to modify conceptualized steel properties.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.cim_3: §7MV machines inside decided which concept it will be. They need to be all the same and need to run all the time during crafting.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.coating_shrine_: §6Coating allows you to infuse items with fluid properties. Fluid in the middle impact recipes.
§7Coating is primitive and imperfect process, fluid in the middle will be consume each 100 crafts. You can right click on controller to get about of charges left.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.cooling_box_1: §3Surprisingly effective device, that works by using cooling coils to accumulate cooling capacity and discharge it to cool fluids or items
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.cooling_box_2: §7Recipes usually shows amount of accumulated cooling capacity required as well as how capacity they will consume. You can right click it to get accumulate cooling capacity. Better cooling coils impact maximum capacity as well as capacity generation over time.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.ct_2: §7Specifically crafted passive cooling tower. It has infinite parallels, 30 times more capacity, 10 times more speed than Cooling Box and just look awesome by itself.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.igp_1: §bMore dense versions of steam is always appreciate
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.igp_2: §7Machine for compressing gases into their dense variants. By default you lose up to 25% of initial gas mass without perfect conditions.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.igp_3: §7Achieving perfect condition is no simple feat. It can occur on two seconds intervals are require all input hatches to be filled from 35% to 85% of its capacity. Some hatches (like ME hatches) don't have capacity, which makes perfect condition impossible.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.infernal_boiler: §cBoiler build from liquid blazes and with stronger version of bronze§f. This almost unnatural device can generate superhot steam in large quantities nearly free!

§7Boiler has two important mechanics.
  First one is heat. Each time boiler completes recipe, it slowly gather heat and after some time increases heat level. Each heat level doubles the possible parallels. Last heat level - Supreme, also overheats recipes, multiplying its output.
§7  Second one is boiler charging. Periodically boiler need to run specific recipes, that can restore its charge, or it will start throttling and dropping heat.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.rcc_2: §7Slighly better version of vacuum freezer, but without batching. When working continuously, reduce recipe duration based on coils and also has some parallel capacity based on coil levels. When level of coil better than voltage requirement of recipe, switches to perfect OC
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.sem_1: A machine capable of extracting resources from spawners
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.sem_2: §7Second logic is just common fluid transformation that require specific mob or mob type inside spawner. For example, if mob inside spawner belong to nether, you can transform distilled water into hellish one.
item_tooltip.gttruesteam.sem_3: §7Machine has two recipe logic. For the first one, you just put sword inside and pump extraction air. Machine will produce mob loot from this spawner. Each craft takes 1 durability from the sword. Sword damage and enchantments like looting, unbreakable, sharpness affects this logic.
message.gttruesteam.optional_upgrade: §7This is optional upgrade for multiblock, air can be used instead.
tooltip.gttruesteam.cooling_coils_perfec: §bPerfect OC: §fRecipe with %s or less base voltage
